events.old_context: if ( m_info.macroName[0] == 0 ) expr = static_cast<std::string>(m_info.capturedExpression); else { expr.reserve( m_info.macroName.size() + m_info.capturedExpression.size() + 4 ); expr += m_info.macroName; expr += "( "; expr += m_info.capturedExpression; expr += " )"; }
events.new_context: if ( m_info.macroName.empty() ) expr = static_cast<std::string>(m_info.capturedExpression); else { expr.reserve( m_info.macroName.size() + m_info.capturedExpression.size() + 4 ); expr += m_info.macroName; expr += "( "; expr += m_info.capturedExpression; expr += " )"; }
